Strips fitter and look for him late.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 12 at Goulburn Ctry Bm58 on March 22 over 1300m, slow going head behind Brutal Eyes carrying 61.5kg at $5. Before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 7 at this track Bm58 on March 1 over 1400m, slow going 2 len behind Sablonneuse carrying 61.5kg at $3.20. Went close last time. Going well and a win looks imminent.
